overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating through a dense cyberpunk urban environment. The clip transitions from a sunlit intersection beneath an elevated highway, through commercial plazas with neon signage, along graffiti-covered elevated walkways, into dark covered underpasses, and finally emerging at street-level food vendors. The footage features high-quality ray-traced lighting with vivid neon accents against concrete architecture.

events.description: large delivery truck passes from left to right across the intersection
character begins crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: navigating across a wide intersection under an elevated highway while monitoring passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: large delivery truck driving past the crosswalk from left to right
pedestrian in tactical gear standing near the crosswalk waiting to cross

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead casting strong shadows across the street
multi-story red building with balconies, air conditioning units, and graffiti tags
tall blue glass tower with modern architecture visible in the background
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and red borders

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive elevated highway overpass in a cyberpunk urban setting. The camera follows the character crossing a yellow-striped intersection while a large truck passes by on the left. Red residential buildings line the left side while futuristic towers rise in the background, creating a contrast between old and new architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated commercial pedestrian plaza with stairs

events.description: ascending from street level to elevated pedestrian plaza via wide concrete stairs
turning right to follow the pedestrian walkway lined with commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs into a commercial plaza while following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket and white shorts walking ahead up the stairs and through the plaza

entered.detail: wide concrete steps with yellow safety markings leading up to the commercial level
multi-story building with pink neon signage and Japanese character displays
traditional-style paper lanterns suspended from the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character ascends wide concrete stairs from the street into an elevated commercial plaza. The scene features traditional hanging lanterns mixed with cyberpunk neon signage on the buildings. The camera follows a pedestrian in a yellow jacket through this transitional space where the elevated highway recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk with graffiti walls and guard rails

events.description: passing the pink neon hotel sign while maintaining pace behind the yellow-jacketed pedestrian
approaching the entrance to a covered walkway beneath the highway structure

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket along an elevated walkway lined with extensive graffiti art

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket maintaining steady walking pace ahead on the walkway

entered.detail: long concrete retaining wall covered in colorful spray paint, tags, and street art
white metal guard rail separating the pedestrian walkway from the street below
large vertical pink neon sign reading HOTEL on the building facade
green and red automated vending machine with glowing product display and Japanese text

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated sidewalk featuring a prominent graffiti-covered wall on the left and guard rails on the right. The path passes a glowing pink hotel sign and a green vending machine before approaching a dark covered walkway entrance. The pedestrian in the yellow jacket continues to lead the way through this commercial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway infrastructure

events.description: entering the dark covered walkway, bright sunlight fades to dim artificial lighting
passing steam vents emitting white smoke near parked vehicles on the right

agents.ego_description: moving through a dimly lit covered walkway beneath the highway, navigating between concrete pillars

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian tunnel beneath the highway with overhead concrete beams and dim lighting
massive cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the highway structure overhead
vents emitting white steam or smoke near the parked vehicles

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, enclosed walkway beneath the highway infrastructure. The lighting shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to dim artificial lights. Massive concrete support pillars line the path while steam rises from vents near parked vehicles. The environment feels industrial and confined compared to the open streets above.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level commercial area with food vendors

events.description: exiting the covered walkway back into direct sunlight
descending the concrete ramp toward street level food vendors

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass and descending a ramp toward a street-level food stall area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the food stall at the bottom of the ramp

entered.detail: street food vendor stall with illuminated menu displays and neon signage reading EL GUAPO
concrete ramp with metal railings leading down from the elevated walkway to street level

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark underpass back into sunlight, descending a concrete ramp toward street level. A food stall with bright neon signage becomes visible on the left. The transition from the enclosed, artificial environment to the open commercial street marks the end of the journey through this urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense cyberpunk district that transitions from a sunlit intersection into a dark industrial underpass before emerging back into the open city. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, following a character across a yellow-striped intersection flanked by red residential buildings and towering futuristic skyscrapers. As the character ascends wide concrete stairs, the scene shifts into an elevated commercial plaza where traditional lanterns blend with neon signage, leading the camera along a graffiti-covered sidewalk past glowing hotel signs and vending machines. The environment then contracts as the camera enters a dark, enclosed walkway beneath the highway infrastructure, where bright sunlight is replaced by dim artificial lights, massive concrete pillars, and rising steam. Finally, the camera emerges from the industrial gloom back into the sunlight, descending a concrete ramp toward a street-level food stall with vivid neon accents.
